task_completion.description: Create and complete a Standard Purchase Order to 'Seed Farm Inc.' for 200 units of 'Azalea Bush'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Purchase Order window showing Vendor/BPartner as 'Seed Farm Inc.', Document Status as 'Completed' (or 'CO'), and a PO line for 200 units of 'Azalea Bush'.

task_completion.description: Process a Material Receipt for the full PO quantity
task_completion.visual_evidence: Material Receipt window showing Vendor/BPartner as 'Seed Farm Inc.', Document Status as 'Completed', and a receipt line for 200 units of 'Azalea Bush'.

task_completion.description: Create and complete a matched Vendor Invoice for the goods
task_completion.visual_evidence: Purchase Invoice window showing Vendor/BPartner as 'Seed Farm Inc.', Document Status as 'Completed', and an invoice line for 200 units of 'Azalea Bush'.

task_completion.description: Create a second Vendor Invoice for $75.00 using the 'Freight Charges' charge
task_completion.visual_evidence: Purchase Invoice window showing Vendor/BPartner as 'Seed Farm Inc.', Document Status as 'Completed', and an invoice line with Charge 'Freight Charges' (not just 'Freight') for an amount of $75.00.

task_completion.description: Link the freight to the material receipt on the invoice line's 'Landed Costs' tab
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Purchase Invoice window for the freight invoice, the 'Landed Costs' tab (under Invoice Line) shows a record linking the freight charge to the previously created Material Receipt.

task_completion.description: Process a single outgoing Vendor Payment for the combined total using check number 'CHK-P2P-2026'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Payment window showing Vendor/BPartner as 'Seed Farm Inc.', Document Status as 'Completed', Check No as 'CHK-P2P-2026', and a Payment Amount of either $3,075.00 or $5,075.00.

task_completion.description: Use Payment Allocation to allocate the payment against both invoices
task_completion.visual_evidence: Payment Allocation window showing the payment record allocated against both the goods invoice and the freight invoice.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the iDempiere GUI in the browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the iDempiere web interface being used to create and complete documents.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or direct database queries to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or SQL clients are visible executing commands to insert or update records.

integrity.description: Records appear to be genuinely entered in the application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating through tabs, entering data in fields, and clicking buttons like 'Complete' in the iDempiere UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Vendor: 'Seed Farm Inc.'. Product: 'Azalea Bush'. PO Qty: 200. Charge: 'Freight Charges' (plural). Freight Amount: $75.00. Check Number: 'CHK-P2P-2026'. Expected Payment Total: $3,075.00 (if std price $15 is used) or $5,075.00 (if list price $25 is used). Document Status for all completed documents should be 'CO' (Completed). The 'Landed Costs' tab is located within the 'Purchase Invoice and Credit/Debit Note' window under the invoice line.
